provisional_note: PROVISIONAL per ASSAYER protocol: probed via headless hython, NOT the live WS bridge (only Read+Bash tools available; no ToolSearch/MCP surface). hython build 22.0.368 is byte-identical to the drop record and the build the bridge would hit, so NO build mismatch. Only caveat is transport: GUI-only surfaces (item 5) are GUI-OWED; all render/COP legs are engine-real and live-verified headless including Karma XPU (2 devices). Reconfirm item-5 GUI legs on the live bridge before coding against them.
key_finding_indie: H21-era Indie-silently-no-ops-headless-husk does NOT hold on 22.0.368: husk wrote real multi-part EXRs headless on Indie, CPU and XPU.

1_karma_object_id_aov.title: Karma integer object-ID render var (CPU and XPU)
1_karma_object_id_aov.mechanism: karmarendersettings.primid=1 toggle (parms primid, primidfilter, primidprecision) auto-generates the object-ID AOV from Karma ray attr source ray:primid. A bare rendervar (sourceType=raw; sourceName primId/primid/id/instanceId/elementId) WITHOUT the toggle produced NO ID buffer (only C). Toggle required; rendervar redundant. instanceId/elementId did not resolve on non-instanced geo (INCONCLUSIVE - needs instanced scene).
1_karma_object_id_aov.aov_in_exr: subimage part primid, channel primid.id, pixel type float32, colorspace Raw
1_karma_object_id_aov.cpu_xpu_parity_output: CPU engine=cpu xpu_device_count=0 aov name=primid source=ray:primid ; XPU engine=xpu xpu_device_count=2 aov name=primid source=ray:primid - IDENTICAL on both engines
1_karma_object_id_aov.nonfatal_warning: Pixel filter minmax Mode idcover requires PrimId channel (1 error; EXR + primid AOV still written)
1_karma_object_id_aov.crypto_fallback: VERIFIED-PRESENT (not render-tested): node type karmacryptomatte exists; rendervar has cryptomatte parms; docs name Cryptomatte Object Name / Cryptomatte Material Name. primid preferred per blueprint s5.

2_rop_scripts_and_timing_trap.title: ROP pre/post-render script params + timing trap
2_rop_scripts_and_timing_trap.timing_output: EXR mtime=118.897 ; husk_postframe t=118.902 (+5ms) ; husk_postrender t=118.904 (+7ms) ; ROP-level postrender t=119.109 (+212ms, in calling process after husk exit)
2_rop_scripts_and_timing_trap.design_conclusion: .done sentinel MUST ride husk-level husk_postframe/husk_postrender (-> husk --postframe-script/--postrender-script), firing within ~5ms of pixels. ROP-level postrender is USD-gen/lifecycle-scoped (docs: fires at USD-gen time not husk-finish), process-dependent - do NOT use for pixel-done sentinel.
2_rop_scripts_and_timing_trap.gotcha: husk-level scripts pass on husk command line and MUST be FILE PATHS (space-free). Inline multi-line code triggers husk: too many positional options. ROP-level scripts accept inline.

3_husk_callback_surface.title: Husk callback surface (one CLI session)
3_husk_callback_surface.verdict: VERIFIED-LIVE (flags) / PARTIAL (verbose-callback end-mode live JSON not isolated)

flags_verbatim.--preframe-script: Python script to edit the stage before each frame is rendered
flags_verbatim.--postframe-script: Python script to edit the stage after each frame is rendered
flags_verbatim.--postrender-script: Python script to edit the stage after all frames are rendered
flags_verbatim.--snapshot (=-1): Snapshot partial image after this many seconds
flags_verbatim.--verbose-callback: Override the verbose Python callback defined in UsdRenderers.json
flags_verbatim.--verbose-callback-interval (=-1): Override the verbose callback interval defined in UsdRenderers.json

3_husk_callback_surface.metadata_flag: ROP husk_metadata_key/husk_metadata_value -> husk --extra-metadata KEY VALUE (confirmed on live husk command line)
3_husk_callback_surface.windows_note: SIGUSR1 absent on Windows; interval --snapshot <sec> (default -1) is the portable checkpoint form. Flag present, default-verified.
3_husk_callback_surface.verbose_callback_smoke: OWED-LIVE: standalone --verbose-callback wiring with confirmed end-mode JSON stats not isolated. Equivalent JSON stats ARE auto-embedded in every EXR as husk:render_stats (item 6) - a filesystem-embedded second stats surface.

4_copernicus_buffer_numpy_readback.title: Copernicus buffer -> numpy readback
4_copernicus_buffer_numpy_readback.path: hou.node(/obj).createNode(copnet) -> generator (constant/ramp/... Cop category) -> gen.cook(force=True) -> gen.layer() returns hou.ImageLayer
4_copernicus_buffer_numpy_readback.roundtrip_output: constant COP: res=(1024,1024) ch=1 storage=Float32 ; allBufferElements bytes len=4194304 = 1024*1024*1*4 ; np.frombuffer(bytes(raw),float32).size=1048576 == w*h*ch (exact) ; reshape (h,w,ch) OK
4_copernicus_buffer_numpy_readback.dtype_from_storage: imageLayerStorageType.Float32 -> np.float32 (4 bytes/elem), confirmed by exact byte-length match. hou.imageLayerStorageType enum exists for the general map.
4_copernicus_buffer_numpy_readback.row_origin_output: vertical ramp COP (rampType menu horizontal/vertical/radial/concentric): row0=0.0005 (pos0=bottom) -> rowLast=0.9995 (pos1=top), monotonic increasing with buffer row index => buffer row 0 == image BOTTOM == BOTTOM-LEFT origin (corroborates HDK IMG-layer + W.1b). T1 numpy arrays are bottom-up; flip to match OIIO/top-down.

5_flipbook_viewport_grab.title: Flipbook / viewport-grab symbols (GUI convenience only)
5_flipbook_viewport_grab.verdict: VERIFIED-PRESENT (symbols) / GUI-OWED (execution) - GUI-ONLY-NEVER-FARM per blueprint s6
5_flipbook_viewport_grab.headless_state: hou.ui present = False (headless hython). Require a live GUI SceneViewer to execute - reconfirm on the live bridge/GUI session; never use on the farm path.

6_exr_header_and_free_receipt.title: EXR header ground truth + the free receipt
6_exr_header_and_free_receipt.multipart: YES - husk writes multi-subimage EXR. Probe produced 2 subimages: part C(R,G,B,A) + part primid(primid.id). oiio:subimages=2. T0 header checks MUST be multi-part-aware.
6_exr_header_and_free_receipt.channel_naming: per-part subimage; beauty part C channels R,G,B,A; AOV part primid single channel primid.id (convention part.channel)
6_exr_header_and_free_receipt.per_aov_pixel_types: DATA-DRIVEN: beauty C = 16-bit float (half); primid = float32. NEVER assume half-float - read type from header. Storage=scanline, compression=zips, chunkCount=225. Colorspace lin_rec709 (C) / Raw (primid).
6_exr_header_and_free_receipt.free_receipt_output: husk_metadata_key=synapse_retina_fingerprint value=rm1deadbeef -> EXR header carries synapse_retina_fingerprint (type string) = rm1deadbeef. CONFIRMED - manifest fingerprint travels INSIDE the artifact (T0 upgrade). Mechanism: husk_metadata_* -> husk --extra-metadata -> EXR metadata.
6_exr_header_and_free_receipt.bonus_auto_provenance: husk auto-stamps every EXR: husk:render_stats (full JSON incl per-AOV aov_buffers+source, world_to_camera/world_to_raster/world_to_ndc matrices, engine, xpu_device_count, geometry_counts, resolution, render_camera), husk:command, husk:usd_file, husk:usd_file_stats, worldToCamera/worldToNDC (m44f+m44d), Software=Karma (cpu|xpu) 22.0.368. Substantial scene-truth already free in every husk frame.
